name: 里山のおと 夏草こみち
slug: 里山のおと-夏草こみち
short_description: "Satoyama note: natsukusa komichi" is a novel game about the creatures that live in satoyama. Collect illustrated books and take the quiz-style satoyama test. The background music is played live by a shinobue flute, and the world is depicted by hand-drawn ink paintings.
detailed_description:
Extra About the Summer Festival Dress-up Kit



As an added bonus, a PDF file of the Summer Festival Dress-up Kit is included.
Print it out, cut it out according to the picture, and play dress-up.

To find the location of the Summer Festival Dress-up Kit PDF file. 1:
1. open the Steam library page.
2. Right-click on "Natsukasokomichi" and click "Browse Local Files".
3. Open "satoyamanote_natsukusa_komichi" folder from the opened folder.
4. In this folder, you will find "summer_fes_dress_up_kit.pdf" which is the summer festival dress-up kit.


About the Game

"In the satoyama of japan, where nature and humans coexist in harmony.
There, a tanuki university was quietly opened,
Raccoon dogs and other creatures were studying human culture..."

The Novel Game "Satoyama note: Natsukusa Komichi" is a novel game about satoyama and its creatures.
Tanuki-kun, who studies human culture at Raccoon University, is in a great hurry to study for a test.
He remembers going to a summer festival with a fox and a frog.
Now, will the test go well?

Game Features

.
  • Novel game depicting the life of living creatures in Satoyama
  • Live background music by shinobue flute, world depicted by hand-drawn ink paintings
  • Collect illustrated books and try quiz games!
  • CG gallery and music player are included!


.
Story.
The film depicts the life and culture of satoyama creatures.
The story progresses from the perspectives of a raccoon dog, fox, frog, and human.
A nostalgic and relaxing story of everyday life.


.
Satoyama Illustrated books.
There are satoyama illustrated books scattered throughout the text of the story.
Let's find and collect them!


.
Satoyama Test.
Test your knowledge of Satoyama.
Try the quiz-style mini-game!


Extra.
See illustrations that were not used in the game,
You can listen to your favorite music with the music player!

Creatures of Satoyama

.
.
Tanuki-kun.
(Japanese Raccoon Dog Nyctereutes viverrinus viverrinus)
I'm studying human culture at tanuki university.
I'm in a big hurry to study for a test.


)
Kitsune-kun.
(Japanese Red Fox Vulpes vulpes japonica)
I'm planning to receive various things at the summer festival.


)
Kaeru-kun.
(Japanese Tree Frog Dryophytes japonicus)
He seems to be excited about going to see the fireworks at the summer festival.
